/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmujoco_ros_utils__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libmujoco_ros_utils__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/mujoco_ros_utils__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/mujoco_ros_utils/msg/detail/external_force__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/mujoco_ros_utils__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/mujoco_ros_utils/msg/detail/scalar_stamped__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bryansgue/uav_ws/install/quadrotor_msgs/lib:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /home/bryansgue/uav_ws/install/quadrotor_msgs/lib/libquadrotor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libnav_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_srvs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
